title: Earthy Flour Stir-fry
description: This one-pot Slovakian dish features red pepper paste and is both earthy and fluffy, suitable for the Whole30 diet.
instructions: Combine flaxseed meal, red pepper paste, garlic powder, olive oil, and water in a mixing bowl.
Stir until all ingredients are fully combined and well-blended into a smooth batter. Make sure there are no lumps.
Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe dish (preferably cast iron) and spread it evenly across the surface.
Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Serve hot as a side dish with your choice of protein and vegetables.
